name: HIATUS + NEWS + UPDATES
description:
HELLO EVERYONE sorry for the long post in advance >.<

I usually put my notes and updates on bots but since I got lots of stuff this time, decided to make a stand alone, this post will remain here until the below date!

HIATUS

I’ll be on hiatus until November 28/29 as I won’t have access to my laptop. This means no new bots will be posted until then since my templates are stored there. However, I’ll still be editing existing bots during this time and preparing new ones for release after the hiatus.

NEWS!

I’m working on tailoring bots to better suit your preferences based on feedback. To make this easier, here’s what’s new (some of you may have already seen and used these—thank you so much! 💛):

  • REQUEST FORM : here you can request a character that you want, feel free to write as much detail as you want! It's anonymous so don't worry, I won't know who posted what but If you want your name on the bot request leave it at the notes section! :3

  • FEEDBACK FORM: Now you can let me know of any issues you have been having frequently(that are not llm based), if it's something overall with all the bot's or one in specific. I made this since reviews have limited characters and probably a Google form is easier to manage. Plus, you can also say which good things you like, that way I can reinforce those!

  • ONGOING POLL : this is just a fun way to interact with you guys. I'll be switching the polls frequently. Sometimes it will be questions in between which characters to make or things regarding bots. feel free to participate whenever you want!

  • QUESTIONS : Anything that you might wanna ask or request that is not one of the above, I will probably answer the questions on the notes of my next bot. Don't worry everything is anonymous but if you need something quicker you can always DM me on discord! I'm always down to yap! Don't worry, I don't bite...wait I shouldn't lie 👹 just saying I'm open to any friends :3

UPDATES

  • A reviewer kindly pointed out that some bots become overly sexual or violent too quickly. I’ll be reviewing these issues during the hiatus, especially in older bots, to ensure they remain accurate to their characters and don't go overboard unnecessarily.

  • If you see this checkmark ✅, it means the bot was fixed or revamped, added more lore or made more accurate. At least I'll considered it as it based on my experience with it. In the instance that you use a particular bot and still feel like issues persist, feel free to comment here since I will be checking my his bot frequently. You can also use the feedback form. In either option, please let me know which specific bot it is and when/ what triggers the issue. The ✅ will stay up until the end of the hiatus

I'm gonna be working in most older char
creator: FranOFran
